title: IT-31
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:It-311.jpg]] |name=IT-31 |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer=[[Duwani Mechanical Products/Legends|Duwani Mechanical Products]] |line= |model=[[IT-series utility droid]] |class=[[Maintenance droid/Legends|Utility droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height=0.96 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |gender= |pronouns=new |sensor=Blue, yellow and red |plating= |armament= |equipment=*Auditory and sonar scanner *Radar eye *Multi-function arm |affiliation= }} {{Quote|It's a small astromech droid, designation IT-31. It's brown, and a little scruffier than the one beside you.''"
"''Beee-dwreeep?|[[TT-32-GE3]] and [[T3-M4]]|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''}} '''IT-31''' was a [[Maintenance droid/Legends|utility droid]] that belonged to [[Tien Tubb]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], but ended up in the possession of [[Kodin]] when he took it from Tien's junk pile. [[Meetra Surik]] secured the droid's release from Kodin after [[TT-32-GE3]] asked her to, realizing that IT-31 was not actually destroyed. IT-31 returned to Tien Tubb. ==Behind the scenes== As a [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] or Neutral character, the player could either purchase IT-31, or persuade Kodin to give him up. As a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] character, the player could rip out & purchase IT-31's memory core, killing the droid. Alternatively, the player could always threaten or kill Kodin instead of paying or persuading. However, both acts lead to unfavorable outcomes--the former will be despised by T3-M4, while the latter will result in him closing his shop to the player. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=IT-31 |es=IT-31 |fr=IT-31 |pt=Legends:IT-31 }} [[Category:Maintenance droids]] [[Category:Nar Shaddaa residents]]
